name: Parasite Paracide
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>寄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>生</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>虫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>パラサイド
desc:
FLIP: Shuffle this card face-up into your opponent's Deck.
If you draw this card after it was added to your Deck by its effect: Special Summon it in Defense Position, and if you do, take 1000 damage. All monsters controlled by the player that Summoned this card by its effect become Insect monsters.

sets.set: Speed Duel: Streets of Battle City

action: Places itself in the opponent's Deck
Allows face-up cards in Main Deck
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
